name: dotdotgod-workspace
description: Workspace for dotdotgod project memory packages across Pi, docs validation, Claude Code, and Codex adapters.

scripts.verify: pnpm run verify:generated && pnpm run verify:types && pnpm run verify:unit && pnpm -r --if-present run verify
scripts.pack:dry-run: pnpm run verify:generated && pnpm -r --if-present run pack:dry-run
scripts.publish:all: pnpm --filter @dotdotgod/docs-validator publish --access public && pnpm --filter @dotdotgod/pi publish --access public && pnpm --filter @dotdotgod/claude-code publish --access public && pnpm --filter @dotdotgod/codex publish --access public
